_comment: DURABLE planned-work backlog for Project delivery. The CI 'exec-status update' job regenerates data/exec-status.json from merged PRs and would wipe any hand-added planned items; this file is SEPARATE and never touched by CI. The exec page folds these items + wave plan counts + wave NAMES into the timeline + wave % at render time. Edit here to add/close planned work. status 'Later' = planned; 'In Progress' = building now; set to 'Done' with a real PR once shipped. Waves 1-4 = shipped feature history. Waves 5-9 (G1-G5) = the Go-Live Foundation roadmap (see docs/ROADMAP-golive.md).

items.title: Team wellbeing view (capacity & burnout signals)
Fairness view (balanced workload distribution)
WBK component library / templates
Evaluation prep + band calibration
Evaluation consistency (cross-manager band check)
Upward review (evaluate my manager)
Org readiness map
Person growth timeline
Weekly report (auto digest)
G1: Connect the real Webook Event-Ops directory (private source, not in repo)
G1: Real-data import path (people + org tree) via scripts/data-load
G1: Sample-data flag flips off cleanly; badge only shows when data is sample
G1: Keep PII out of the public bundle (hash emails, no raw names/phones in dist)
G2: Turn on Supabase email+password and invite real staff
G2: Sign-in maps verified email to the real person + correct role
G2: Fail-closed in production (no directory-gate fallback, unknown email denied)
G2: Password reset + change flow verified end to end
G3: Real work (assignments/check-ins/evaluations) persists to live Supabase
G3: Role-scoped reads hold on real data (peer/manager/director)
G3: Graceful offline + conflict handling proven with real accounts
G3: Close the manual-upload dev hole on production
G4: Choose + wire the production deploy target (gated to real staff)
G4: Environment split - sample/demo build vs real build (reversible flag)
G4: Secrets only in backend; nothing sensitive in repo or bundle
G4: Access management + admin-invite flow verified on the live target
G5: Every page's empty/error/loading/RTL/mobile state verified on real data
G5: Health/monitoring signal so we know if it breaks
G5: Onboarding - how staff get access, how an admin adds someone
G5: Known-limits doc + one-step rollback runbook
